header.headline: Book Your Appointment
header.description: Select a Monday slot below. You'll receive a Calendly confirmation email with the office address and what to bring.

reminders.disclaimer: Cash or check only. Do not sign documents in advance. Walk-ins not accepted.

bring.payment: Exact cash or check (payable to Sylvia Rich)
bring.unsigned: Any supporting documents from your booking notes

fromQuiz.label: From Quiz
fromQuiz.note: Your answers will be included in the booking

calendar.promptBody: All appointments are Monday afternoons. Choose a date to see available times.
calendar.disclaimer: Cash or check only. Do not sign documents in advance.
